name: jiangyue-website-imagegen
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue Technology website image direction and production briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Create precise Jiangyue industrial website visuals.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for clarifying website image intent, forming production briefs, and guiding image generation or deterministic SVG/canvas composition for B2B industrial brand assets.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to clarify and create a website visual.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to turn a rough image idea into a production brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to review and improve a Jiangyue website image.
